title.en: Durban Fastener Supplier: IBR Roofing Screws & Construction Fasteners from China
title.zh: 德班紧固件供应商：来自中国的IBR屋顶螺丝和建筑紧固件

description.en: Your trusted Durban fastener supplier. SABS-approved IBR roofing nails, self-drilling screws, and structural bolts shipped from China. Factory prices, sea freight to Durban port. Get quote in 24 hours.
description.zh: 您值得信赖的德班紧固件供应商。SABS认证的IBR屋顶钉、自钻螺丝和结构螺栓，从中国发货。德班港口海运，工厂价格，24小时内报价。

keywords: Durban fastener supplier, IBR roofing screws Durban, construction fasteners South Africa, self-drilling screws KwaZulu-Natal, SABS approved fasteners, Durban hardware wholesaler, roof nails South Africa, China fastener supplier Africa

heading.en: Why Durban Businesses Choose TradeGo as Their Fastener Supplier
heading.zh: 为什么德班企业选择TradeGo作为紧固件供应商

body.en: Durban is South Africa's busiest port city and the gateway to KwaZulu-Natal's construction boom. With the province's construction sector growing at 6.8% annually, finding reliable fastener suppliers is critical for contractors, roofing specialists, and hardware retailers. TradeGo Fasteners has served Durban businesses for over 12 years, shipping factory-direct fasteners to Durban port at competitive prices. Our most popular products for Durban customers include IBR roofing nails (SABS 1195 compliant), self-drilling screws with EPDM washers for metal roofing, and high-tensile structural bolts for commercial construction. Whether you're based in Durban CBD, Pietermaritzburg, or Richards Bay, we deliver to your site via our established logistics network.
body.zh: 德班是南非最繁忙的港口城市，也是夸祖鲁-纳塔尔省建筑热潮的门户。随着该省建筑业以每年6.8%的速度增长，寻找可靠的紧固件供应商对承包商、屋顶专业人员和五金零售商至关重要。TradeGo紧固件为德班企业提供超过12年的服务，以竞争力的价格从工厂直接运送紧固件到德班港。我们为德班客户提供的最受欢迎的产品包括IBR屋顶钉（SABS 1195认证）、带EPDM垫圈的自动钻孔螺丝用于金属屋顶，以及用于商业建筑的高强度结构螺栓。无论您位于德班市中心、彼得马里茨堡还是理查兹湾，我们通过成熟的物流网络将货物送到您的工地。

heading.en: Fasteners We Supply to Durban & KwaZulu-Natal
heading.zh: 我们供应给德班和夸祖鲁-纳塔尔省的紧固件

body.en: Our Durban customers primarily order these fastener categories: IBR roofing nails and screws (SABS approved), self-drilling TEK screws for steel framing, hex bolts and nuts (Grade 8.8 and 10.9), coach screws for timber construction, anchor bolts for foundation work, washers and spring washers in various sizes.
body.zh: 我们的德班客户主要订购这些紧固件类别：IBR屋顶钉和螺丝（SABS认证）、用于钢框架的自钻TEK螺丝、六角螺栓和螺母（8.8级和10.9级）、用于木结构的车身螺丝、用于基础工程的锚固螺栓、各种尺寸的垫圈和弹簧垫圈。

heading.zh: 德班紧固件定价与运输

body.en: We ship fasteners from our factories in Guangdong, China to Durban port via sea freight. Average sea freight cost: $280-$450 per 20ft container. Shipping time: 25-30 days to Durban port. We handle all export documentation including Bill of Lading, Commercial Invoice, and Certificate of Origin. For bulk orders over 20ft container, we can arrange door-to-door delivery to your warehouse in Durban, Pietermaritzburg, or Newcastle.
body.zh: 我们从中国广东的工厂通过海运将紧固件运送到德班港。平均海运成本：每20英尺集装箱280-450美元。运输时间：25-30天到德班港。我们处理所有出口文件，包括提单、商业发票和原产地证书。对于超过20英尺集装箱的大宗订单，我们可以安排门到门送货到您在德班、彼得马里茨堡或纽卡斯尔的仓库。

q.en: Do your IBR roofing nails have SABS approval?
q.zh: 您的IBR屋顶钉是否有SABS认证？

a.en: Yes, our IBR roofing nails are SABS 1195 compliant and we can provide certification documents for customs clearance in South Africa.
a.zh: 是的，我们的IBR屋顶钉符合SABS 1195标准，我们可以提供南非海关清关所需的认证文件。

q.en: What is the minimum order quantity for Durban customers?
q.zh: 德班客户的最低订单量是多少？

a.en: MOQ varies by product. For IBR roofing nails, MOQ is 5,000 pieces. For bulk orders (full container), we offer 8-12% discount.
a.zh: 最低订单量因产品而异。对于IBR屋顶钉，最低订单量为5,000件。对于大宗订单（整箱），我们提供8-12%的折扣。

q.en: How long does shipping to Durban take?
q.zh: 运送到德班需要多长时间？

a.en: Sea freight from China to Durban port takes 25-30 days. Once at port, we can arrange inland transport to your location.
a.zh: 从中国海运到德班港需要25-30天。一旦到达港口，我们可以安排内陆运输到您的地点。
